# Bowenstreet Market Mall
> A 120-vendor antique and vintage marketplace in Oshkosh, Wisconsin

## About
Bowenstreet Market Mall is a curated multi-vendor marketplace featuring handcrafted, vintage, and antique goods. Located at 2837 Bowen St, Oshkosh WI 54901.

## Shop
Browse our vendors' items at /shop/index.html
Each vendor has their own booth with unique inventory.

## For Vendors
Vendor portal: /vendor/login.html
- Manage your inventory and pricing
- View sales history and balance
- Upload item photos

## Contact
Visit us at 2837 Bowen St, Oshkosh WI 54901
